# kUSBAddExtraResetTimeMask

**Enumeration Case**

The mask to request extra time after reset.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBAddExtraResetTimeMask = ( 1 << kUSBAddExtraResetTimeBit)
```
title: kUSBAddExtraResetTimeMask
